data.content: Planned 4f8e. The contradiction is caused by `VersionBadge` using compile-time `NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_VERSION` while the banner uses canonical `/api/version` from `release-version.ts`. Implement by making `/api/version` the only UI source, passing installed version through the header into the badge, removing the env-bundled badge constant, updating forced checks to refresh shared status, and adding focused tests. Next implementation should use a dedicated worktree and must not use PR workflow.
